assertions.reason: Could not validate quote-updates-as-you-type behavior because environment data appears unseeded (no chart data, 24H volume $0.00) and receive quote stayed 0 across multiple input changes; USD equivalents were not visible.
evidence: snapshot observation: You pay changed (1 -> 9) while You receive remained "0"
network: repeated GET http://localhost:3100/depth and GET http://localhost:3100/market on reload

assertions.reason: Disconnected CTA state is visible, but connected CTA states (Swap / Enter an amount / Insufficient balance) could not be validated because no local Aptos wallet extension is installed and social login requires external account credentials.
evidence: wallet modal options observed: Petra/Nightly/Backpack install links (no connected wallet)

assertions.reason: Swap execution could not be attempted because wallet connection/signing is unavailable in this isolated run; CTA remains Connect Wallet and no signed transaction path is reachable.
evidence: wallet modal shows install links and social sign-in entry points only

assertions.reason: Limit form UI is present (buy/sell toggle, price and amount fields) and can be filled, but Place Order submission via SDK could not be validated without a connected/signing wallet.
evidence: observation: CTA remained Connect Wallet while in Limit tab

frictions.description: Wallet connect flow in this environment requires either browser wallet extensions (not installed) or external Google/Apple auth credentials.
frictions.resolution: Attempted Aptos wallet path and Google auth path; both were non-actionable in isolated run.

frictions.description: Swap quote verification is constrained by empty/zero market state (no chart data and zero volume), preventing confidence in dynamic quote assertion behavior.
frictions.resolution: Retested with multiple input amounts and captured repeated depth/market requests.

blockers.description: No connected/signing wallet available in browser session (wallet extensions absent; social auth requires credentials).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened wallet modal, verified install-only Aptos extension options, attempted Google auth redirect, then returned to app.

blockers.description: Environment appears unseeded for market/liquidity data (No chart data, $0.00 volume), so quote dynamics remain at zero and cannot be fully validated.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried on fresh reload and multiple amount inputs; captured network requests to /depth and /market.

summary: Tested 4 assigned assertions (VAL-SWAP-005/007/008/009): all 4 are blocked by environment prerequisites (wallet connectivity/signing and non-seeded market data), with screenshots and console checks captured for each.
